title: Slash String Command
description: This adds a customizable /string command. It makes grinding for emeralds much easier and faster.
body:
Slash String Command is a lightweight Paper plugin for Minecraft 1.21+ that adds a customizable /string command, allowing players to quickly receive a full inventory of string for trading with villagers. This makes grinding emeralds and progressing through trades significantly faster and more convenient, especially on SMPs.

**Players only:**

```
/string
```



**Admins only:**
```
/string cooldown
```
To control how often players can use the command, helping balance gameplay and prevent abuse. Simple, efficient, and focused on QOL, it’s perfect for servers that want smoother villager trading without spending hours grinding for small amounts of emeralds.
